name: Avrupa Yatirim Holding A.S.
summary: Avrupa Yatirim Holding A.S. invests in health, energy, construction, and software sectors in Turkey. The company was formerly known as Baysan Trafo Radyatorleri Sanayi ve Ticaret A.S. and changed its name to Avrupa Yatirim Holding A.S. in December 2014. The company was founded in 1976 and is based in Istanbul, Turkey. Avrupa Yatirim Holding A.S. operates as a subsidiary of Alsancak Health Services Trade A.S.
